title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Citation Excel XLS+ Performance With G5000
text: Garmin's (GRMN) G5000-integrated flight deck retrofits Cessna Citation Excel XLS+ and XLS Gen2 aircraft.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Fitness Tracking Efforts With New Watch
text: Garmin (GRMN) launches vivoactive 5 to boost its smartwatch offerings and fitness segment.

title: Garmin achieves top spot in Avionics Product Support Survey for 20th consecutive year
text: Based on direct responses from aircraft owners and operators around the world, annual ranking recognizes Garmin for overall excellence in supporting customers OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced it was honored with the top spot in Aviation International News' (AIN) 2023 Avionics Product Support Survey for the 20th consecutive year.

title: Garmin announces G5000 integrated flight deck retrofit coming soon for Cessna Citation XLS+ and XLS Gen2 aircraft
text: Certification will expand the successful G5000 upgrade program for Citation Excel and Citation XLS OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced it will expand its portfolio of G5000® integrated flight deck retrofit upgrades to include the popular Cessna Citation XLS+ and XLS Gen2 aircraft.

title: Garmin named 2023 Manufacturer of the Year by the National Marine Electronics Association
text: For nine years running, Garmin earns top NMEA honors and adds five Product of Excellence Awards to its winning streak OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, has been named Manufacturer of the Year in the large manufacturer category for the ninth consecutive year by members of the National Marine Electronics Association (NMEA®) at its annual conference and awards banquet held Sept.

title: Introducing the vívoactive 5 GPS smartwatch from Garmin
text: On-wrist fitness coaching, personalized health insights, detailed sleep stats and more are packed into the newest smartwatch with a stunning AMOLED display—all at an affordable price OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced vívoactive® 5, its latest health and fitness smartwatch with a bright AMOLED touchscreen display that is designed to be an essential part of everyday life at an affordable price.

title: Garmin completes acquisition of JL Audio
text: JL Audio technology will be integrated into Garmin's marine segment OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin Ltd.

title: Garmin's (GRMN) New GFC 500 Certification to Aid Aviation Unit
text: Garmin (GRMN) receives certification from the FAA for GFC 500 digital autopilot use in the Cessna 177/177A Cardinal and the Beechcraft T34A/T34B Series.

title: 3 Passive Income Stocks That Can Help Make You Richer

title: 3 Under-the-Radar Tech Stocks to Buy in 2023

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Marine Segment With New Chartplotters
text: Garmin (GRMN) unveils the GPSMAP 9000 chartplotter series, offering comprehensive connectivity with faster networking speeds.

title: Garmin introduces the GPSMAP 9000 series, the recreational marine market's largest chartplotters with 4K resolution
text: Flagship MFD series delivers superior design and performance, plus enhanced connectivity and speed with the new Garmin BlueNet gigabit network     OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today unveiled its flagship GPSMAP® 9000 chartplotter series designed for captains who demand the best.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Closing In On A Historic First Year
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 0.57% in August, outperforming the S&P 500 by 1.02%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.07%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 3.95% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Marine Offerings With its New Radars
text: Garmin (GRMN) launches two new magnetron dome radars, namely the GMR 18 xHD3 and the GMR 24 xHD3.

title: Garmin expands xHD3 series with new magnetron dome radars
text: New magnetron radomes offer premium features for maximum clarity, accuracy and awareness OLATHE, Kan. , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced the addition of two radars to the magnetron lineup, the GMR™ xHD3/HD3 dome radar series.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Expands Smartwatch Offerings With Venu 3 Series
text: Garmin (GRMN) unveils a series of premium multisport GPS smartwatches, namely Venu 3 and Venu 3S, to boost its smartwatch offerings.
